button.primary: bg-[#0052FF] text-white rounded-full py-4 px-6 font-semibold flex flex-row items-center justify-center
button.secondary: bg-slate-100 text-slate-900 rounded-full py-4 px-6 font-semibold flex flex-row items-center justify-center
button.outline: border border-slate-200 text-slate-900 rounded-full py-4 px-6 font-semibold flex flex-row items-center justify-center bg-transparent
button.check_in_cta: bg-[#0052FF] text-white rounded-full py-6 px-8 font-bold text-lg flex flex-col items-center justify-center shadow-lg shadow-blue-500/30

card.default: bg-white border border-slate-100 rounded-2xl p-5 shadow-sm

input.default: bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-base text-slate-900

bottom_tab_bar.style: bg-white border-t border-slate-100 flex-row justify-around items-center h-20 pb-safe

employee_home.layout: Vertical scroll view with safe area top
elements: Main Card: Current Status & Massive Check-In/Out Button (data-testid='check-in-btn')

shift_registration.layout: Form layout with sticky bottom CTA

elements: List of past shifts with status indicators (completed, missed)
Stats row: Present, Absent, Late (High-contrast typography)

iconography.style: stroke-width: 2, clean, uncluttered. Use Phosphor or Lucide.

image_urls.description: Abstract blue and white background for the login screen.
Modern office interior for empty states or header backgrounds

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Tailwind classes with NativeWind for styling. The classes provided in 'components' are Tailwind syntax.
Implement the bottom tab navigator for Employee (Home, History, Profile) and Admin (Dashboard, Employees, History).
The check-in/out button on the Employee Home screen should be massive and highly visible, using the 'check_in_cta' component guidelines.
Native time pickers (@react-native-community/datetimepicker) should be used for shift registrations.
Admin dashboard needs clear, high-contrast typography for metrics (e.g., 'text-3xl font-bold text-[#0052FF]').
Ensure all interactive elements have the specified `data-testid` attributes.
